_comment: COST-CONSCIOUS SETTINGS — Aggressive cost savings profile.
Defaults to Haiku for most tasks. Restricts expensive operations.
Best for: solo devs on tight budgets, routine maintenance, simple tasks.
Trade-off: lower quality on complex reasoning, more turns for hard problems.
Copy this file to your project's .claude/settings.json

model._comment: Use Haiku for everything. Override per-task with /model if needed.

preferences._comment_verbosity: Minimal output = fewer output tokens = lower cost.

CLAUDE.md._comment: Use the minimal template (~320 tokens) to reduce per-turn overhead.

fileReading._comment: Read only what's needed — avoid ingesting full large files.

permissions._comment: Block network/install operations to prevent costly side effects.

behavior._comment_editStyle: Make targeted edits — avoid rewriting entire files.
behavior._comment_search: Search first, read only relevant sections.

costGuardrails._comment: Hard limits to prevent runaway sessions. Ask for confirmation past 7 turns.
